title: Design Pressure Limit
summary: Compressor designed for 350 psig discharge pressure; bearing and casing rated accordingly.
evidence_quote: 轴承和机箱设计适用于 350磅/英寸2排出口压力.

title: Oil Heater Power
summary: Standard unit equipped with 2 or 3 500W oil heaters.
evidence_quote: 标准的机组配备有 2个或 3个500W的油加热器

title: Oil Temperature Range for R-717 (External Cooling)
summary: Oil temperature should be maintained between 120°F and 140°F for R-717 with external oil cooling.

title: Oil Temperature Range for R-22 (Liquid Injection)
summary: Oil temperature should be maintained between 130°F and 150°F for R-22 with liquid injection cooling.

title: Minimum Clearance for Service Access
summary: Recommended minimum clearance of 36 inches at both ends of the unit for service.
evidence_quote: 在设备两端须留有维修空间 , 推荐的最小尺寸为 36英寸(917.28mm).

title: Foundation Thickness
summary: Foundation should be at least 6 inches of reinforced concrete.
evidence_quote: 地基应当至少是 6英寸(152.88mm) 的增强混凝土

title: Cold Start Valve Spring Pressure (High Stage)
summary: Cold start valve spring generates 30 PSI pressure above suction for high stage compressors.
evidence_quote: 对于高压级压缩机, 冷启动阀装有一个很大的弹簧, 使油分产生 30个PSI的压力 (高于吸气压力)

title: Cold Start Valve Spring Pressure (Multi-stage)
summary: In multi-stage applications, the spring generates only 15 PSI before the valve fully opens.
evidence_quote: 多级应用的时候，弹簧在阀完全打开前只产生 15PSI的压力。

title: Suction Check Valve Spring Pressure (High Stage)
summary: For high stage systems, check valve CK-1 should be installed with a 40 PSI spring.
evidence_quote: 对于高压级系统, 截止阀 CK-1应该和 40PSI的弹簧一 同安装

title: Suction Check Valve Spring Pressure (Booster Stage)
summary: For booster stage systems, check valve CK-1 should be installed with a 15 PSI spring.
evidence_quote: 对于增压级系统, 截止阀 CK-1应该和 15PSI的弹簧一 同安装

title: Oil Filter Torque Specification
summary: Tighten filter element nut to 10 ft-lb and housing bolts to 60-130 ft-lb.
evidence_quote: 将螺母紧固于底板上达到 10磅-英尺(13.3N.m) 的扭力...拧紧至 60磅-英尺(79.8N.m), 直至 130磅-英尺(172.9N.m) 扭力.

title: Oil Pump End Clearance Adjustment
summary: End clearance for oil pump models: GG 0.003", HJ/HL 0.003", AS/AK/AL 0.003".
evidence_quote:
型号                           轴承座外径( 英寸)                               末端间隙 (英寸)
GG                                    7/16                                                    .003
HJ,HL                                  9/16                                                    .003
AS,AK,AL                                1/2                                                     .003

title: Pressure Sensor Voltage at Atmospheric Pressure (PE-4)
summary: PE-4 voltage at standard atmospheric pressure should be 1.48-1.72 VDC.
evidence_quote: 在标准大气压下,(14.7 磅/英寸2绝对压力或 0磅/英寸2表压力),电压读数应为 1.48-1.72VDC 直流电.

title: Pressure Sensor Voltage at Atmospheric Pressure (PE-1, PE-2, PE-3)
summary: PE-1, PE-2, PE-3 voltage at standard atmospheric pressure should be 1.1-1.29 VDC.
evidence_quote: 在标准大气压下, 电压读数在 1.1 – 1.29VDC 之间, PE-1, PE-2, PE-3 与带有 500磅/英寸2的跨度.

title: Slide Valve Potentiometer Resistance
summary: Resistance between red and white wires should be 1000 ±150 ohms when slide valve fully unloaded.
evidence_quote: 电阻值应为 1000±150 欧 姆.

title: Motor Mounting Bolt Torque
summary: Tighten motor mounting bolts to 250 ft-lb.
evidence_quote: 拧紧螺钉到扭矩为 250 ft-lb.

title: Compressor Mounting Bolt Torque
summary: Tighten compressor mounting bolts to 250 ft-lb.
evidence_quote: 用扳手拧紧到 250英尺-磅的扭矩 .

title: Oil Level Sight Glass Position
summary: Normal oil level is at the middle of the top sight glass; running level is between top and bottom sight glasses.
evidence_quote: 正常的装油液面是在位于油分离器外壳中部的顶部观察孔的中间位置 . 正常的运行液面在顶部观察孔和底部观察孔之间的中部.

title: Thermosiphon Oil Cooling Liquid Height Requirement
summary: Liquid level in refrigerant source must be at least 6-8 feet above oil cooler center.
evidence_quote: 制冷剂源的液面, 必须在油冷却器中心上方至少 6-8英尺(1.83-2.44mm).

title: Liquid Injection Pressure Regulator Setting
summary: Set pressure regulator to 40-60 psig during liquid injection adjustment.
evidence_quote: 设定压力调节阀到 40磅/英寸2表压至 60磅/英寸2表压左右.

title: Oil Temperature Control Range (Thermosiphon)
summary: Oil temperature typically 15-35°F above condensing temperature; condensing 65-105°F, oil 80-140°F.
evidence_quote: 油温一般降在冷凝温度以上约 15°F-35° F. 冷凝温度: 65 °F - 105° F 油温度:  80 °F - 140°F

title: Economizer Cutoff Capacity
summary: Economizer liquid supply typically shut off when capacity drops below 45-60% (85-90% slide valve position).
evidence_quote: 微处理器的一个输出一般被用于在容量降到 45-60%的容量以下(85%-90% 的滑阀位置 )时, 关闭壳管式经济器或 DX经济器中闪蒸液体的供应.

title: Compressor Rotation Direction
summary: Compressor rotates clockwise when facing the drive shaft.
evidence_quote: 当面对压缩机轴底部时 ,压缩机是顺时针转动的 .

title: Suction Superheat Recommendation
summary: Recommended compressor inlet vapor temperature 10°F above saturation.
evidence_quote: 推荐压缩机入口蒸气温度, 要比制冷剂的饱和温度高出 10°F

title: Oil Pump Lubrication Interval
summary: Lubricate all grease fittings every 500 hours or 60 days, whichever comes first.
evidence_quote: 每运行 500小时或 60天以后(以先到的时间为准) ，应该润滑所有的加油嘴.

title: Shaft Seal Leakage Rate
summary: Normal shaft seal leakage should not exceed 7 drops per minute.
evidence_quote: 如果泄漏超过正常允许的 7滴每分钟的速率, 更换密封件.

title: Oil Pump End Clearance Adjustment for High Viscosity
summary: For viscosity over 2500 SSU, add extra end clearance: GG/HJ/HL 0.004", AS/AK/AL 0.005".
evidence_quote: 对于粘度超过 2500SU 的情况，增加额外的末端间隙。(GG ，HJ和HL型号的泵为 0.004’’，AS，AK和AL型号的泵为 0.005’’。)

title: Liquid Injection Dual Port Switchover Vi
summary: Dual port liquid injection switches from SL-1 to SL-2 when Vi exceeds 3.5.
evidence_quote: 当压缩机在 3.5容积比(V i)以下工作时, 压缩机接口 SL-1供给液体冷却 . 当容积比(Vi) 提高到大于 3.5 容积比时,接口 SL-2供给液体冷却.

title: Volumizer Vi Range
summary: Volumizer provides infinitely variable Vi from 2.2 to 5.0.
evidence_quote: 约克制的 VOLUMIZER®容积比控制能在所有型号压缩机运行期间实现从 2.2 到5.0的无级可变体积比.

title: Capacity Control Range
summary: Slide valve provides stepless capacity control from 100% to 10%.
evidence_quote: 可移动的滑阀提供从 100%到10%的无级容量控制.

title: Suction Flange Rating
summary: Suction flange is 300 psig ANSI type.
evidence_quote: 吸气法兰是 300psig ANSI 型

title: Control Transformer Size
summary: A 2.0 KVA control transformer provides 120V control power.
evidence_quote: 一台 2.0KVA控制变压 器, 以便提供 120V控制电源.

title: Oil Filter Differential Pressure Alarm
summary: Slowly open inlet valve to avoid sudden pressure drop that may cause oil filter differential pressure alarm.
evidence_quote: 要慢慢打开入口工作阀以防止引起突然的压降, 此压降可能会引起油过滤器的压差警报.

title: Vacuum Level for System Evacuation
summary: Evacuate system to 29.88 inches Hg vacuum.
evidence_quote: 把系统抽空至 29.88英寸汞柱的真空.

title: Shipping Charge Pressure
summary: Shipping charge instruments suitable for 30 PSIG.
evidence_quote: 在分离器和外部油冷却器上的充气装运仪器适用于表压为 30PSIG

title: Oil Cooler Water pH Range
summary: Maintain cooling water pH between 6.0 and 7.4 to extend heat exchanger life.
evidence_quote: 需要经常保持在 PH=7.4-6.0 之间

title: Oil Cooler Cleaning Solution
summary: Recommended cleaning solution: 3% phosphoric or oxalic acid.
evidence_quote: 清洗：推荐使用 3%的磷酸或乙二酸溶液。

title: Oil Cooler Cleaning Duration
summary: Backflush oil cooler with cleaning solution for about 30 minutes.
evidence_quote: 油冷却器应用推荐的溶液反向冲洗约 30分钟

title: Motor Bearing Lubrication Schedule
summary: Follow motor manufacturer's lubrication recommendations; refer to standard motor lubrication schedule Figure 22.
evidence_quote: 应遵从电动机生产厂关于润滑的维护建议 . 见标准电机的润滑计划, 见图 22.

title: Oil Pump Grease Type
summary: Use NLGI #2 multipurpose grease for oil pump bearings.
evidence_quote: 在内置滚珠轴承中抹上多用途的 NLGI#2 润滑脂。

title: Oil Pump Grease Amount for Thrust Bearing Cavity
summary: Fill approximately 1/2 of the cavity between inner bearing and double row bearing with NLGI #2 grease.
evidence_quote: 在内轴承和双排滚珠轴承之间的润滑腔内装上约 1/2的多用途的 NLGI#2润滑脂。

title: Oil Pump Lip Seal Orientation
summary: Lip seal should face the shaft end.
evidence_quote: 唇封应该面对轴的末端。

title: Oil Pump Bearing Installation Direction
summary: Install bearing with sealed side facing the rear top of the pump.
evidence_quote: 把轴承安装到壳体内，轴承的密封面面向泵的后顶端。

title: Oil Pump Head Orientation
summary: Offset connecting pin on pump head must face upward and maintain same distance between ports.
evidence_quote: 泵头部的偏置的连接销必须朝上且连接口之间保持相同的距离以使适当的流体通过泵体。

title: Oil Pump Thrust Bearing Adjustment Method
summary: Turn thrust bearing clockwise until noticeable resistance (zero end clearance), then back off specified distance.
evidence_quote: 转动转轮的时候顺时针转动止推轴承组件直到出现明显的阻力。这个是零末端间隙。...逆时针转动止推轴承，下面列出的距离是在轴承座外面测量的。

title: Oil Pump Graphite Bushing Installation Caution
summary: Graphite bushing is brittle; install straight with steady pressure, do not stop until fully seated.
evidence_quote: 在衬套到正确位置之前要一直保持按压。否则开机与关机会引起衬套的破裂。

title: Oil Pump Mechanical Seal Handling
summary: Do not touch seal faces with anything except clean hands or cloth; particles can cause leakage.
evidence_quote: 除了干净的手或布以外，不要触摸密封表面。细微的颗粒会破坏密封表面从而引起泄漏。

title: Oil Pump Shaft Seal Area Preparation
summary: Remove scratches or sharp edges from shaft seal area with fine emery cloth.
evidence_quote: 轴上密封区域的刮痕是发生泄露的通道，用优质的金刚砂布去除刮痕或尖锐。

title: Oil Pump Bearing Cleaning Method
summary: Clean bearings with clean solvent and dry with compressed air; do not spin bearings.

structured_payload.value: solvent and compressed air, do not spin

evidence_quote: 用干净的溶液清洗轴承，然后用压缩空气吹干。不要使轴承翻转；用手缓慢地转动轴承。

title: Oil Pump Bearing Inspection After Cleaning
summary: After cleaning, lubricate bearings with refrigeration oil and check roughness by feel.
evidence_quote: 确信轴承已经干净以后，用冷冻油润滑轴承并检查其粗糙度。用手触模滚珠滚道可以检测出其粗糙程度。

title: Oil Pump Mechanical Seal Installation Timing
summary: Install stationary part quickly after rotary part to avoid misalignment; seal adheres to shaft within minutes.
evidence_quote: 一旦密封的旋转部件安装到旋转轴上以后，尽可能快地装好固定部件，保证密封没有使轴处于错误的轴向位置。安装好几分钟以后，密封件会黏附在轴上。

title: Oil Pump Seal Cavity Preparation
summary: Clean rotary hub and housing seal bore; coat seal seat inside and outside with refrigeration oil.

structured_payload.value: clean and coat with refrigeration oil

evidence_quote: 清洗旋转轮毂和外壳密封座孔，确保没有灰尘和砂砾。在密封座的内外涂上冷冻油。

title: Oil Pump Shaft Installation Lubrication
summary: Apply liberal refrigeration oil to shaft, tapered mounting sleeve, and internal seal parts.
evidence_quote: 把大量的冷冻油涂在旋转轴、锲型安装套筒以及内部的机械密封部件处。

title: Oil Pump Spring Installation on Shaft Hub
summary: Install spring on shaft hub before sliding seal assembly.
evidence_quote: 在轴上轮彀处装上弹簧。

title: Oil Pump Seal Assembly Sliding Method
summary: Slide assembly until it just contacts spring without compressing it, then remove installation sleeve.
evidence_quote: 滑动表面充分接触的组件，通过安装衬套使之刚刚能够接触弹簧但不要压迫弹簧，拿掉安装衬套。

title: Oil Pump Shaft Insertion Depth
summary: Push shaft in slowly until shaft end is just inside housing face.
evidence_quote: 缓慢地把轴推进去，直至轴末端正好位于外壳表面内。

title: Oil Pump Rotor Positioning During Assembly
summary: Do not move rotor and shaft after positioning to avoid disturbing carbon seal face.
evidence_quote: 把转轮放在这个位置。移动转轮和轴会移动碳密封的旋转面从而引起密封的破坏。

title: Oil Pump Head O-ring Installation
summary: Place O-ring on head before mounting head and idler assembly.
evidence_quote: 在头部放上 O型环，把头部和偏置轮部件装在泵上。

title: Oil Pump Head Bolt Tightening
summary: Tighten head cap screws evenly.
evidence_quote: 平衡地拧紧头部的内六角螺钉。

title: Oil Pump Bearing Installation Tool
summary: Use a copper bar and lead hammer to tap bearing into position.
evidence_quote: 用一根铜条和铅锤轻敲轴承至安装位置处。

title: Oil Pump Snap Ring Installation (GG, HJ, HL)
summary: Install shaft snap ring in shaft groove for GG, HJ, HL models.
evidence_quote: GG，HJ，HL：在轴槽内装上轴弹性挡环。

title: Oil Pump Bearing Spacer Installation (AS, AK, AL)
summary: Install bearing spacer on shaft against single row ball bearing for AS, AK, AL models.
evidence_quote: AS，AK，AL ：在轴上安装轴承垫片，靠着单排滚珠轴承。

title: Oil Pump Thrust Bearing Assembly Installation
summary: Screw thrust bearing assembly into housing by hand until snug, then tighten locknut.
evidence_quote: 把止推轴承组件装入壳体。用手旋紧，防止转轮碰到顶部。更换并且拧紧锁定螺母和轴。

title: Oil Pump Back Clearance Adjustment
summary: Adjust back clearance after assembly by loosening two screws on thrust bearing assembly front.
evidence_quote: 松开止推轴承装置前端的两颗螺钉。

title: Oil Pump Shaft Free Rotation Check
summary: If shaft does not turn freely, turn thrust bearing counterclockwise until free.
evidence_quote: 如果轴旋转不顺畅的话，逆时针转动止推轴承直到轴能够自由旋转。

title: Oil Pump Thrust Bearing Locking
summary: After adjusting end clearance, tighten two set screws on front of bearing housing.
evidence_quote: 止推轴承组件的位置调节以后，拧紧轴承座前面的两颗固定螺钉。

title: Oil Pump Disassembly Safety
summary: Before opening pump liquid cavity, ensure pressure is relieved and moving parts are locked out.

structured_payload.value: relieve pressure, lock out moving parts

evidence_quote:
在打开任何型式油泵的液体腔 ( 泵压室、存储室、壳体  ) 的时候，确认：
1.腔体内的压力已经通过吸排气口或其他的接口排出壳体外。
2.运动部件 (电动机，涡轮，发动机等) 已经被“ 锁定” 或不可运行

title: Oil Pump Head Marking for Reassembly
summary: Mark head and casing before disassembly to ensure correct reassembly position.
evidence_quote: 在头部和壳体做好标记以确保重新装配时正确位置。

title: Oil Pump Head Removal Precaution
summary: Tilt head back when removing to prevent idler from falling off pin.
evidence_quote: 移开的时候使泵的头部向后倾斜，防止连接轮从销中跌落。

title: Oil Pump Locknut Removal Method
summary: Insert copper bar or hardwood between port and rotor gear to prevent shaft rotation, then turn locknut counterclockwise.
evidence_quote: 在开孔和旋转齿轮之间插入一根铜条或一块硬木防止轴的转动。逆时针转动锁紧螺钉并取出螺钉。

title: Oil Pump Thrust Bearing Removal (GG, HJ, HL)
summary: Loosen two screws on front of bearing housing, turn thrust bearing counterclockwise and remove.
evidence_quote: 松开轴承座前面的两个螺钉，把止推 轴承逆时钟转动后一起从外壳中取下。

title: Oil Pump Spring Removal (GG, HJ, HL)
summary: Remove compression spring from shaft for GG, HJ, HL models.
evidence_quote: GG，HJ，HL：从轴上取下紧压弹簧

title: Oil Pump Shaft Locator Removal (AS, AK, AL)
summary: Remove shaft locator from shaft for AS, AK, AL models.
evidence_quote: AS，AK，AL：从轴上取下轴定位件

title: Oil Pump Rotor and Shaft Removal
summary: Tap end of shaft with lead hammer to remove rotor and shaft; seal parts will come out with assembly.
evidence_quote: 现在可用铅锤轻轻敲击轴的末端，转子和轴就可以被取下来了。如果使用普通锤和硬木敲击的话，密封部件就会与转轮和轴一起出来了。

title: Oil Pump Bearing Retaining Washer Removal (AS, AK, AL)
summary: Remove bearing retaining washer; it may be stuck to rotor and bearing.
evidence_quote: AS，AK，AL：重新取下轴承定位垫圈。滚珠轴承背后的定位垫圈可能已经和转轮、轴承紧贴在一起了 。

title: Oil Pump Mechanical Seal Rotary Parts Removal
summary: Remove mechanical seal rotary parts and spring from rotor and shaft assembly.
evidence_quote: 从转轮和轴组件上取下机械 密封回转部件和弹簧。

title: Oil Pump Internal Snap Ring and Bearing Removal (GG, HJ, HL)
summary: Remove internal snap ring and single row ball bearing from housing for GG, HJ, HL.
evidence_quote: GG，HJ，HL：从壳体上取下内置弹性挡环和单排滚珠轴承。

title: Oil Pump Single Row Bearing Removal (AS, AK, AL)
summary: Remove single row ball bearing from housing for AS, AK, AL.
evidence_quote: AS，AK，AL ：从壳体上取下单排滚珠轴承。

title: Oil Pump Stationary Seal Removal
summary: Remove seal seat or stationary member from housing.
evidence_quote: 从壳体上取下密封底座或固定部件。

title: Oil Pump Thrust Bearing Disassembly (GG, HJ, HL)
summary: Remove snap ring and ball bearing from bearing housing for GG, HJ, HL.
evidence_quote: GG，HJ，HL：从轴承座里取出弹性挡圈和滚珠轴承。

title: Oil Pump Thrust Bearing Disassembly (AS, AK, AL)
summary: Loosen two set screws on flange outer ring, turn socket head screw and lip seal counterclockwise to remove, then remove ball bearing.
evidence_quote: AS，AK，AL ：松开法兰外圈上的两个固定螺钉。逆时针旋转内六角螺钉和唇封并取下它们，然后取出滚珠轴承。

title: Oil Pump Housing Inspection
summary: Inspect housing for wear, especially between ports.
evidence_quote: 壳体应该检查其磨损情况，特别是各孔口之间的部分。

title: Oil Pump Component Replacement Recommendation
summary: When replacing major parts like rotor and shaft, install new mechanical seal, head and idler pin, idler, and bushing.

structured_payload.value: new seal, head pin, idler, bushing

evidence_quote: 在更换诸如转轮和轴等重要部件时，建议应该安装新的机械密封，头杆和偏置杆，偏置轮以及衬套。

title: Oil Pump Parts Cleaning and Inspection
summary: Clean all parts thoroughly and inspect for wear or damage; replace lip seals, bearings, bushings, and idler pins if damaged.
evidence_quote: 仔细清洗所有的部件并且检查有无磨损和损坏。检查唇封、轴承、衬套和偏置杆，如果有损坏就更换。

title: Oil Pump Other Parts Inspection
summary: Check other parts for nicks, burrs, and excessive wear; replace if found.
evidence_quote: 检查其他部件有无伤痕、毛刺和过度磨损，如果有就更换。

title: Oil Pump Idler and Bushing Installation
summary: Coat idler pin with refrigeration oil, place idler and bushing on head idler pin.

structured_payload.value: coat pin with oil, place idler and bushing

evidence_quote: 在偏置杆上涂上冷冻油，把偏置轮和衬套套在头部偏置杆上。

title: Oil Pump Seal Seat Installation
summary: Start seal seat into seal cavity; use clean cardboard over wood dowel if needed for protection.

structured_payload.value: start into cavity, use cardboard if needed

evidence_quote: 开始在密封腔内密封底部。如果需要保护的话，使用一干净的纸板搭在一根木条处。确认密封座完全安装在孔内。

title: Oil Pump Sleeve Installation on Shaft
summary: Insert sleeve over shaft for mechanical seal repositioning on GG, AS, AK, AL models.
evidence_quote: 请在轴上插入套筒。见图 20。套筒由 GG，AS， AK组成，AL 重新布置机械密封。

title: Oil Pump Lubrication for Seal Installation
summary: Apply liberal refrigeration oil to shaft, tapered mounting sleeve, and internal seal parts; gasoline may be used but grease not recommended.
evidence_quote: 把大量的冷冻油涂在旋转轴、锲型安装套筒以及内部的机械密封部件处。也可以使用汽油但是不推荐使用润滑脂。

title: Oil Pump Spring Installation on Hub
summary: Install spring on shaft hub.
evidence_quote: 在轴上轮彀处装上弹簧。

title: Oil Pump Seal Assembly Sliding
summary: Slide assembly until it just contacts spring without compressing, then remove installation sleeve.
evidence_quote: 滑动表面充分接触的组件，通过安装衬套使之刚刚能够接触弹簧但不要压迫弹簧，拿掉安装衬套。

title: Oil Pump Shaft Insertion
summary: Push shaft in slowly until shaft end is just inside housing face.
evidence_quote: 缓慢地把轴推进去，直至轴末端正好位于外壳表面内。

title: Oil Pump Rotor Positioning
summary: Do not move rotor and shaft after positioning to avoid disturbing carbon seal face.
evidence_quote: 把转轮放在这个位置。移动转轮和轴会移动碳密封的旋转面从而引起密封的破坏。

title: Oil Pump Head O-ring
summary: Place O-ring on head before mounting.
evidence_quote: 在头部放上 O型环，把头部和偏置轮部件装在泵上。

title: Oil Pump Head Bolt Tightening
summary: Tighten head cap screws evenly.
evidence_quote: 平衡地拧紧头部的内六角螺钉。

title: Oil Pump Bearing Grease
summary: Pack inner ball bearing with NLGI #2 multipurpose grease.
evidence_quote: 在内置滚珠轴承中抹上多用途的 NLGI#2 润滑脂。

title: Oil Pump Bearing Installation Direction (GG, HJ, HL)
summary: Install bearing into housing with sealed side facing rear top of pump; tap into position with copper bar and lead hammer; install snap ring.
evidence_quote: GG，HJ，HL：把轴承安装到壳体内，轴承的密封面面向泵的后顶端。移动轴承至孔内。用一根铜条和铅锤轻敲轴承至安装位置处。装上弹性挡环。

title: Oil Pump Bearing Installation Direction (AS, AK, AL)
summary: Install bearing into housing with sealed side facing rear top of pump; tap into position with copper bar and lead hammer.
evidence_quote: AS，AK，AL ：在装上所有的轴承之前，先在轴上装上定位垫圈。：把轴承安装到壳体内，轴承的密封面面向泵的后顶端。移动轴承至孔内。用一根铜条和铅锤轻敲轴承至安装位置处。

title: Oil Pump Shaft Snap Ring (GG, HJ, HL)
summary: Install shaft snap ring in shaft groove.
evidence_quote: GG，HJ，HL：在轴槽内装上轴弹性挡环。

title: Oil Pump Bearing Spacer (AS, AK, AL)
summary: Install bearing spacer on shaft against single row ball bearing.
evidence_quote: AS，AK，AL ：在轴上安装轴承垫片，靠着单排滚珠轴承。

title: Oil Pump Grease Cavity Fill
summary: Fill approximately 1/2 of grease cavity between inner bearing and double row bearing with NLGI #2 grease.
evidence_quote: 在内轴承和双排滚珠轴承之间的润滑腔内装上约 1/2的多用途的 NLGI#2润滑脂。

title: Oil Pump Double Row Bearing Grease
summary: Pack double row ball bearing with NLGI #2 multipurpose grease.
evidence_quote: 在双排滚珠轴承中装上多用途的 NLGI#2 润滑脂。

title: Oil Pump Thrust Bearing Assembly (GG, HJ, HL)
summary: Install bearing into bearing housing with back face toward shaft end hub; install snap ring with tapered edge away from bearing.

structured_payload.value: back face toward hub, snap ring tapered edge away

evidence_quote: GG，HJ，HL：把轴承安装到轴承座内，背面面向轴末端轮彀。见图 1。安装一弹性挡环来限制滚珠轴承。弹性挡环有一锲形边缘卡在轴承座内的锲形槽内。锲形边缘远离滚珠轴承。

title: Oil Pump Thrust Bearing Assembly (AS, AK, AL)
summary: Install all bearings into bearing housing; install lip seal at end of housing facing shaft end; install bearing washer inside lip seal and tighten set screws.

structured_payload.value: lip seal facing shaft end, tighten set screws

evidence_quote: AS，AK，AL ：把所有的轴承装入轴承座内。在轴承座的末端装上唇封。唇封应该面对轴的末端。把轴承垫圈装在唇封内，并且把它们装到轴承座里，拧紧固定螺钉。

title: Oil Pump Rotor Locking for Assembly
summary: Insert copper bar or hardwood between rotor teeth to prevent shaft rotation.
evidence_quote: 在转轮齿轮之间插入一条铜条或硬木，以免轴发生转动。

title: Oil Pump Thrust Bearing Assembly Installation
summary: Screw thrust bearing assembly into housing by hand until snug, then replace and tighten locknut and shaft.
evidence_quote: 把止推轴承组件装入壳体。用手旋紧，防止转轮碰到顶部。更换并且拧紧锁定螺母和轴。

title: Oil Pump Rotor Unlocking
summary: Remove copper bar or hardwood from port.
evidence_quote: 从开孔移去铜条或硬木。

title: Oil Pump Back Clearance Adjustment
summary: Adjust back clearance after assembly.
evidence_quote: 调节泵体后面的间隙。

title: Oil Pump Safety Guard Requirement
summary: Ensure all moving parts have safety guards before starting pump.
evidence_quote: 在启动泵之前确认所有的运动部件已安装了安全装置。

title: Oil Pump Thrust Bearing Adjustment Procedure
summary: Loosen two screws on front of thrust bearing assembly; if shaft not free, turn thrust bearing counterclockwise until free.

structured_payload.value: loosen screws, turn counterclockwise if needed

evidence_quote: 松开止推轴承装置前端的两颗螺钉。如果轴旋转不顺畅的话，逆时针转动止推轴承直到轴能够自由旋转。

title: Oil Pump Zero End Clearance Setting
summary: Turn thrust bearing clockwise while turning rotor until noticeable resistance (zero end clearance).
evidence_quote: 转动转轮的时候顺时针转动止推轴承组件直到出现明显的阻力。这个是零末端间隙。

title: Oil Pump End Clearance Measurement
summary: Mark relative position of bearing housing to casing, then back off thrust bearing by specified distance measured on outside of bearing housing.

structured_payload.value: mark position, back off per table

evidence_quote: 记下轴承座与壳体的相对位置。逆时针转动止推轴承，下面列出的距离是在轴承座外面测量的。

title: Oil Pump Thrust Bearing Locking After Adjustment
summary: Tighten two set screws on front of bearing housing after adjusting position.
evidence_quote: 止推轴承组件的位置调节以后，拧紧轴承座前面的两颗固定螺钉。

title: Oil Pump End Clearance for High Viscosity
summary: For viscosity over 2500 SSU, add extra end clearance: GG, HJ, HL 0.004"; AS, AK, AL 0.005".
evidence_quote: 对于粘度超过 2500SU 的情况，增加额外的末端间隙。(GG ，HJ和HL型号的泵为 0.004’’，AS，AK和AL型号的泵为 0.005’’。)

title: Oil Pump End Clearance Table
summary: End clearance: GG 0.003", HJ/HL 0.003", AS/AK/AL 0.003".
evidence_quote:
型号                           轴承座外径( 英寸)                               末端间隙 (英寸)
GG                                    7/16                                                    .003
HJ,HL                                  9/16                                                    .003
AS,AK,AL                                1/2                                                     .003

title: Graphite Bushing Installation Caution
summary: Graphite bushing is brittle; install straight with steady pressure, do not stop until fully seated.
evidence_quote: 在安装石墨衬套的时候必须非常小心以防破裂。石墨是一种脆性材料，容易破裂。...在衬套到正确位置之前要一直保持按压。

title: Graphite Bushing Inspection After Installation
summary: Check bushing for cracks after installation.
evidence_quote: 安装好以后检查衬套是否有裂痕。

title: Oil Pump Disassembly Safety
summary: Before opening pump liquid cavity, ensure pressure is relieved and moving parts are locked out.

structured_payload.value: relieve pressure, lock out moving parts

evidence_quote:
在打开任何型式油泵的液体腔 ( 泵压室、存储室、壳体  ) 的时候，确认：
1.腔体内的压力已经通过吸排气口或其他的接口排出壳体外。
2.运动部件( 电动机，涡轮，发动机等) 已经被“ 锁定” 或不可运行

title: Oil Pump Marking Before Disassembly
summary: Mark valve and end before disassembly to ensure correct reassembly.
evidence_quote: 在阀和端部做好标记以确保正确的再次装配。

title: Oil Pump Troubleshooting Safety
summary: Before any pump adjustment or opening liquid cavity, ensure pressure is relieved, moving parts locked out, and pump temperature is safe.

structured_payload.value: relieve pressure, lock out, cool down

evidence_quote:
在做任何泵的调节或以任何形式打开泵的液体腔的时候，确认以下几点：
1.腔体内的压力已经通过吸排气口或其他的接口排出壳体外。
2.运动部件 (电动机，涡轮，发动机等) 已经被“ 锁定” 或不可运行
3.泵体温度已经冷却到不会对人体造成灼伤的温度。

title: Oil Pump Vacuum Gauge High Reading Causes
summary: High vacuum gauge reading indicates: clogged suction line, high viscosity, high lift, or small line size.

structured_payload.value: clogged suction line, high viscosity, high lift, small line

evidence_quote:
1.大的读数表明：
a.吸液管线堵塞 - 底阀堵塞，闸阀关闭，过滤器拥塞。
b.在管路中流动的液体粘性太高。
c.提升位置过高。
d.管线尺寸太细。

title: Oil Pump Vacuum Gauge Low Reading Causes
summary: Low vacuum gauge reading indicates: suction line leak, end of pipe not in liquid, pump worn, or pump needs oil.

structured_payload.value: suction leak, pipe not in liquid, pump worn, needs oil

evidence_quote:
2.小的读数表明：
a.吸液管泄露。
b.管的末端不是液态。
c.泵破损。
d.泵缺少润滑，应该加油了。

title: Oil Pump Vacuum Gauge Fluctuating Causes
summary: Fluctuating vacuum gauge indicates: liquid vaporizing, liquid entering in slugs, or vibration from cavitation/unbalance/damage.
evidence_quote:
3.起伏跳动或不稳定的读数：
a.液体蒸发。
b.液体以液滴形式进入泵体 —可能是空气泄露或吸液管末端没有足够的液体。
c.振动来自气蚀、不平衡或损坏部件。

title: Oil Pump Pressure Gauge High Reading Causes
summary: High discharge pressure gauge reading indicates: high viscosity, long/small discharge line, partially closed valve, clogged filter, high specific gravity, buildup, cold liquid, chemical reaction, or high relief valve setting.
evidence_quote:
1.大的读数表明：
a. 粘性系数太高，太小或者太长的排气管线。
b. 闸阀部分关闭。
c. 过滤器堵塞。
d. 液体的比重不大。
e. 管道内由于杂物堆积而部分堵塞。
f. 管道内液体温度太低。
g. 管道内液体发生化学反应并产生了结块。
h. 缓解阀设定过高。

title: Oil Pump Pressure Gauge Low Reading Causes
summary: Low discharge pressure gauge reading indicates: low relief valve setting, relief valve poppet not seated, excessive external clearance, or pump worn.

structured_payload.value: low relief setting, poppet not seated, excessive clearance, pump worn

evidence_quote:
2.小的读数表明：
a.缓解阀设定过低。
b.缓解阀的提动头不在正确的位置。
c.外部间隙太大。
d.泵破损。

title: Oil Pump Pressure Gauge Fluctuating Causes
summary: Fluctuating discharge pressure gauge indicates: cavitation, liquid entering in slugs, air leak in suction, or vibration from misalignment/mechanical issues.
evidence_quote:
3.起伏跳动或不稳定的读数：
a.气蚀。
b.液体以液滴形式进入泵体。
c.吸液管有空气渗入。
d. 振动来自安装不平衡或机械问题。

title: Oil Pump Not Pumping Causes
summary: Pump not pumping: air leak, low liquid level, wrong rotation, slow motor, closed valves, clogged filter, relief valve open, pump worn, tight end clearance, incorrect head position.
evidence_quote:
1.泵不工作。
a.空气泄漏进来，箱体内液位太低。
b.旋转方向不正确。
c.电机转速较慢。
d.吸排液阀没有打开。
e.过滤器阻塞。
f.缓解阀开得太小或提升头还开着。
g.泵破损。
h.液体系统的任何变化或操作将会帮助解释问题。
i.拧紧末端间隙。
j.泵的头部位置不正确。

title: Oil Pump Stops After Starting Causes
summary: Pump stops after starting: low liquid level, liquid vaporizing in suction, air leak in suction or seal, pump worn.

structured_payload.value: low level, vaporizing, air leak, pump worn

evidence_quote:
2.开启泵以后，一会就不工作了。
a.箱体内液位太低。
b.吸液管线内液体发生蒸发。
c.吸液管线内有空气渗入；在密封处有空气渗入。
d.泵破损。

title: Oil Pump Excessive Noise Causes
summary: Excessive noise: insufficient liquid, cavitation, misalignment, bent shaft/rotor teeth, foreign object in suction.

structured_payload.value: insufficient liquid, cavitation, misalignment, bent parts, foreign object

evidence_quote:
3.泵工作噪音过大。
a.没有足够的液体进入泵内 (比重比较大的液体不能很快进入 )。增加吸液管径或减少长度。
b.泵发生气蚀 (吸液管内液体蒸发 )。增加吸液管径或减少长度。
c.检查校准。
d.可能轴或转轮齿瓣发生弯曲。把它们弄直或者更换。
e.可能在泵的吸入口有一外来物体试图进入泵内。

title: Oil Pump Not Reaching Rated Capacity Causes
summary: Not reaching rated capacity: insufficient liquid/cavitation, partially clogged filter, air leak, slow speed, relief valve open, pump worn, tight end clearance, incorrect head position.
evidence_quote:
4.泵没有到达额定能力。
a.液体不够或者发生气蚀 --- 增加吸液管径 或减少长度。
b.过滤器部分阻塞—清洗。
c.在吸液管或泵轴有空气进入。
d.转动太慢 – 马达是否在正确的速度，接线是否正确。
e.缓解阀开的太小或者仍旧开着。
f.泵破损。
g.拧紧末端间隙。
h.泵的头部位置不正确。

title: Oil Pump Excessive Power Consumption Causes
summary: Excessive power consumption: speed too high, viscosity too high, discharge pressure higher than calculated, misalignment, insufficient internal clearances.

structured_payload.value: high speed, high viscosity, high discharge pressure, misalignment, tight clearances

evidence_quote:
5.泵耗电量太大。
a.转的太快 – 马达是否在正确的转速，减少转比和传动带尺寸。
b.液体粘性太大超过了泵所能够泵送的能力 – 加热液体， 增加管路尺寸，降 低转速或者 更换更大 的马达。
c.排液口压力超过计算值— 检查压力表。增加管路尺寸或减少长度。降低转速或者更换大的马达。
d.泵的校准不正确。
e.泵的部件间隙不能满足工作条件。检查泵内部件之间的接触，在需要的地方增加间隙。

title: Oil Pump Rapid Wear Causes
summary: Rapid wear: check for loss of pumping ability or pressure; deep grooves, galling, twisting, cracking indicate problems.

structured_payload.value: loss of ability/pressure, deep grooves, galling, etc.

evidence_quote:
6.磨损太快
检查泵是否丧失了泵送能力或压力，在各部件上将会出现光滑磨损的图案。太快的磨损表现为深的磨损沟纹，咬合，扭曲，破裂或类似的问题表现。

title: Oil Pump Preventive Maintenance Lubrication
summary: Lubricate all grease fittings every 500 hours or 60 days, whichever comes first; use #2 ball bearing grease, special grease for extreme temperatures.
evidence_quote: 1.润滑。每运行 500小时或 60天以后(以先到的时间为准) ，应该润滑所有的加油嘴。如果要求比较严格的话，可以增加润滑的频率。用手持润滑枪轻轻地加入。一般使用 #2号滚珠轴承润滑脂。在冷或热的环境下应使用特定的润滑脂。

title: Oil Pump Preventive Maintenance Seal Adjustment
summary: Occasional seal adjustment can keep leakage minimal; if tightening doesn't reduce leakage, replace seal or use other seal type.
evidence_quote: 2.密封调节。偶尔的密封调节可以使泄漏保持在一个微小的量；如果轻轻拧紧不能减少泄露的话应更换密封件或使用其他密封形式。

title: Oil Pump Preventive Maintenance End Clearance Adjustment
summary: Reset end clearance periodically to restore pump efficiency after wear.
evidence_quote: 3.末端间隙调整。长时间的运行使转轮齿瓣末端和头部之间的间隙通过磨损将会变大，从而使泵失去能力和压头。重新设置末端间隙一般会提高泵的效率。

title: Vibration Analysis Guidelines
summary: Take vibration readings at same location and load percentage; use initial startup readings as baseline.
evidence_quote: 要确保从同一位置在相同的负荷百分率下读取振动记录 . 使用新机组启动时得到的振动读数作为基准参考

title: Vibration Analysis Caution
summary: Vibration readings can be affected by nearby equipment or connected piping.
evidence_quote: 振动读数会受到附近或与压缩机共连管线的其它正在运行设备的影响 .

title: Oil Quality Analysis Rules
summary: Use only Frick-approved oil and filters; perform regular oil analysis.
evidence_quote: 只可用 Frick冷冻机油或由 Frick公司认可的高质量冷冻机油. 只能使用 Frick公司生产的油过滤器或者经过  Frick公司认可可以使用的油过滤器。有规律,定期的油分析对于油和系统整体的维护是有帮助的.

title: Operating Log Frequency
summary: Take readings at least every four hours.
evidence_quote: 建议至少每四小时读取一次数据.

title: Troubleshooting Approach
summary: Four-step troubleshooting: define problem, list possible causes, test to find root cause, correct.
evidence_quote:
有效地分析操作中的故障并进行改正, 需要遵循以下四步:
(1) 确定故障及其范围.
(2) 判断所有可能导致故障发生的原因.
(3) 测试没有原因直到找到故障根源.
(4) 采取必要的修改.

title: Abnormal System Conditions Affecting Compressor
summary: List of abnormal system conditions: insufficient/excessive load, high suction pressure, high superheat, high discharge pressure, low refrigerant charge, incorrect cooling liquid temperature, liquid floodback, incorrect evaporator feed, mineral buildup in water-cooled oil cooler, undersized evaporator/condenser, incorrect piping, electrical faults, air/moisture in system.
evidence_quote:
下面列出不正常的系统条件会造成 RWF压缩机组的不正常运行:
(1) 不充足或过量的制冷负荷.
(2) 吸气压力过高
(3) 吸气过热度过高
(4) 排气压力过高
(5) 制冷剂充注量不足或储液器位置低
(6) 去油冷却器的冷却液体温度过高或过低
(7) 液体从系统中返流( 阻塞)
(8) 去蒸发器的制冷剂过多或过少.
(9) 用水冷却的油冷却器内高矿物含量的水阻塞管路.
(10) 蒸发器或冷凝器的尺寸不足 .
(11)  制冷剂管线尺寸不正确.
(12) 不正确的管道系统
(13) 压缩机电气元件故障.
(14) 系统中出现空气和水分.

title: Cold Start Valve Maintenance Warning
summary: Do not attempt to service cold start valve; contact Frick service department.
evidence_quote: 不要尝试维护冷启动阀。请联系 Frick公司的服务部门。

title: Pressure Sensor Test Procedure (PE-4)
summary: Isolate PE-4, vent to atmosphere, measure voltage between white and black on P4; should be 1.48-1.72 VDC at standard atmospheric pressure.
evidence_quote: 从机组中隔开入口传感器 PE-4并使之减压. ...用数字伏特计测定单板机上连接器 P4上的 PE-4电压(白色和黑色端子间) ...在标准大气压下,(14.7 磅/英寸2绝对压力或 0磅/英寸2表压力),电压读数应为 1.48-1.72VDC 直流电.

title: Pressure Sensor Test Procedure (PE-1, PE-2, PE-3)
summary: Isolate sensor, vent to atmosphere, measure voltage; should be 1.1-1.29 VDC for 500 psig span sensors.
evidence_quote: 把油压传感器 PE-1与系统隔离并打开接通大气. ...测定单板计算机连接器 P4上的 PE-1的电压 (白色和黑色端子之间 ) ...在标准大气压下, 电压读数在 1.1 – 1.29VDC 之间, PE-1, PE-2, PE-3 与带有 500磅/英寸2的跨度.

title: Pressure Sensor Replacement Procedure
summary: Shut off control power, close isolation valve, disconnect wires, unscrew sensor, install new sensor, reconnect, open valve, restore power.

structured_payload.value: shut power, close valve, replace, restore

evidence_quote: 切断控制电源 ...关闭传感 器隔离阀. ...松开要更换的传感器上的端子螺栓, 拆开传感器导线. ...用扳手拧松在传感器底板处的金属六角螺钉, 拆下传感器. ...安装新传感器 . ...重新连接传感器. ...重新打开传感器隔离阀. ...接通控制电源 .

title: Slide Valve Potentiometer Replacement and Adjustment
summary: Replace potentiometer, then coarse adjust resistance to 1000±150 ohms with slide valve fully unloaded; fine adjust POT#4 for 0% and POT#3 for 100%.
evidence_quote: 粗调必须在滑阀完全卸载且切断控制电源下进行 . ...电阻值应为 1000±150 欧 姆. ...细调必须在滑块完全卸载且压缩机正在运行时进行, 此时运行显示应指示滑阀开度位置为 0%. 若显示大于 0%,调节单板机上的电位计 POT#4,直到显示 0%. ...当滑阀加到全负荷, 显示应为 100%. 若低于 100%,调节单板机上的电位计 POT#3直到指示为 100%.

title: Linear Capacity Sensor Replacement (Slide Valve)
summary: Shut off control power, remove DIN connector, loosen nut, remove old sensor, install new sensor, tighten nut, reconnect DIN, restore power.
evidence_quote:
1. 切断控制电源 .
2. 从传感器上拆下 DIN接头.
3. 松开螺帽.
4. 移去旧的传感器.
5. 安装新的传感器.
6. 拧紧螺帽.

title: Jordan Temperature Regulator Installation
summary: Install on horizontal line with arrow in flow direction; can be mounted at any angle, even inverted. Bulb vertical (arrow down) needs no special care; bulb horizontal must have 'TOP' correctly oriented; tilted bulb not allowed.

structured_payload.value: horizontal, arrow flow direction, bulb orientation per instructions

evidence_quote: 乔丹温度调节阀必须安装在水平管线上，箭头指向流体流动的方向。然而阀还可以安装在垂墔直于水平管的任何角度的地方，如果需要的话还可以倒装。感温包，垂墔直安装。感温包垂墔直安装 (箭头向下) 的话，不需要什么注意点。当感温包被倒着垂墔直安装的话，需要添加一特别的毛细管，这是因为感温包的顶部高于毛细管的末端。感温包，水平安装。当把感温包水平安装的时候，应使印在毛细管末端的”TOP”字样正确显示 注意：  感温包的倾斜安装是不允许的 。

title: Jordan Temperature Regulator Adjustment
summary: To raise oil temperature, increase spring pressure by turning knurled nut at spring base; to lower, decrease spring pressure.

structured_payload.value: turn knurled nut to adjust spring pressure

evidence_quote: 为了提高油的温度，可以通过旋转弹簧底部的滚花螺母来提高弹簧压力；降低油的温度，可以旋转弹簧底部的滚花螺母来降低弹簧的压力

title: Jordan Temperature Regulator Action Check
summary: Valve should be set as reverse-acting; if direct-acting (orifice left, slot top), rotate disc and seat 180° to change.
evidence_quote: 阀应该被设置成一个反作用力阀，然而有时候会被设置成直接作用力阀。...如果小孔在阀片的左侧且狭缝在阀盘上部的话，这是直接作用阀 (见图 34)。改成反作用阀只需要把阀片和阀盘旋转 180度。这样小孔就在阀片右侧，狭缝就在阀盘的底部 (见图 35)。

title: Jordan Temperature Regulator Stroke Adjustment
summary: After changing action, adjust stroke: remove guide, disc, seat; expose bulb to 80°F; loosen knurled nut and spring; loosen locknut on disc pin, wait 10 min; turn disc pin so bottom is between middle and bottom of slot; tighten locknut; reassemble as reverse-acting; increase spring pressure ~30% by turning knurled nut ~20 quarter-turns.

structured_payload.value: set disc pin position, increase spring 30%

evidence_quote:
按照下面几条来调节阀的行程。
1.移去导盘、阀盘和阀片。
2使感温包垂直暴露于 80。F的环境中
3.松开滚花螺母，松开弹簧。
4.松开阀盘销上的锁定螺母， 留至少 10分钟让阀反映  (见图 36)。
5.当安装阀盘的时候旋转盘片销以使其底部处在狭缝中部与底部之间。
6.用扳手扳住连轴部分，拧紧盘片销上的锁定螺母。
7.以反作用的形式装上阀片和阀盘 (见图 3)。
8.装上导盘和端部法兰。
9.旋转弹簧底部的滚花螺母约 20个1/4圈使弹簧压力增加 30%。

title: Motor Replacement Procedure
summary: Disconnect power, disconnect coupling, remove two screws from motor base, support motor, remove eight bolts connecting motor to tube, remove motor; clean base and shims; install new motor, hand-tighten eight bolts, torque to 250 ft-lb; install two screws on base, torque to 250 ft-lb; reconnect coupling.
evidence_quote:
1. 确认机组主电源已切断并加上标签.
2. 断开电机轴上的连轴器.
3. 从电机座拆除两个螺钉.
4. 用千斤顶撑住电机, 卸下连接电机和筒管的八个螺钉然后卸下电机.
5. 彻底清洗电机座和垫圈及其他确保稳固固定的部件.
6. 用千斤顶撑住电机, 安装并用手拧紧连接电机和管道的八个螺钉, 然后拧紧螺钉到扭矩为 250 ft-lb.
7. 在电机座上安装两个螺钉并拧紧到扭矩为 250 ft-lb. 从电机下移开千斤顶.
8. 重新连接连轴器到电机.

title: Compressor Head Replacement Procedure
summary: Disconnect power, remove piping/wiring, disconnect coupling, support motor and compressor, remove screws from motor base, compressor base, and oil separator flange; clean surfaces; remove compressor from tube by removing pins and screws; connect new compressor with two pins and hand-tighten screws, torque to 250 ft-lb; install gasket at discharge connection; position assembly, shim if needed; reconnect coupling; check alignment by YORK-FRICK; complete piping/wiring.
evidence_quote:
1. 确认机组主电源已切断并加上标签.
2. 卸下连接到压缩机上的接管和电线.
3. 断开电机轴上的连轴器.
4. 用千斤顶撑住电机和压缩机 , 卸下电机, 压缩机底座和油分离器法兰上的螺钉.
5. 彻底清洁压缩机和电机底座和垫圈及其他确保稳固固定的部件.
6. 清洁压缩机和油分离器上的排气法兰表面 .
7. 将机组组件放在清洁的表面上, 卸下连接压缩机到筒管的销和螺钉, 然后卸下压缩机.
8. 通过插入两个销子并用手拧紧螺钉将新的压缩机和筒管连接. 然后用扳手拧紧到 250英尺-磅的扭矩 .
9. 安装密封垫到压缩机和油分离器的排气连接.
10. 使用千斤顶将新的组件放到位, 如果需要的话用薄垫片调整电机和压缩机的底角.
11. 重新安装电机连轴器.
12. 检查轴校准并由 YORK-FRICK 检验偏差.
13. 按照流程图和接线图完成管线连接.

title: Grease Compatibility Warning

title: Electronic Equipment Installation Guidelines
summary: Use larger wire gauge than required to minimize voltage drop; provide clean isolated power source via control transformer; use copper ground wire same size as power wire or one size smaller; do not mix different voltages in same conduit; do not use control panel as junction box; avoid drilling into panel; prevent water ingress; do not add relays/starters without consulting manufacturer; do not run refrigerant lines through panel; follow manufacturer's instructions.
evidence_quote: 要把供电线路的规定定的比电流图所要求的规格大一些 . ...使用一个控制变压器使电子控制器表盘与工厂里产生电磁干扰的其它设备隔离...接地线尺寸要与电源线相同或尺寸小一些 . ...不要把不同电压的导线混合在一起. ...任何与表盘功能无关的导线不要通过电子控制表盘 . ...不要在控制表盘上钻孔来安装导管接头. ...当导管途径电子控制器表盘的顶部 时, 必须考虑水的冷凝问题...在没有和生产厂家联系之前 . 不要在电子控制表盘内添加继电器, 启动器 ,计时器和变压器等. ...不要在电子控制表盘内通过制冷剂管线. ...不要多接头式或并联连接电源或接地线到电子控制盘上 .

structured_payload.value: close breakers, check rotation, heat oil

evidence_quote:
上面项目检查并核对以后：
------------关闭主电源和电动机启动器之间的主断路器。
------------关闭启动器断路器，激活微处理器。
------------手动启动油泵，检查油泵的转向。
------------手动启动压缩机电动机并检查电动机的转向。
------------使微处理器打开，确保油加热器的运行，使油温达到启动温度。

title: Startup Representative Tasks
summary: Confirm valve positions, electrical connections, motor rotation, oil pump rotation, %FLA on microprocessor, calibrate slide valve and slider, calibrate temperature and pressure readings, correct any errors, instruct operator.
evidence_quote:
启动代表：
1.  确认所有阀的位置。
2.  确认所有的电路连接。
3.  确认压缩机电动机转动方向。
4.  确认油泵电动机的转动方向。
5.  确认微处理器上显示的满负荷电流安培(FLA) 的百分比%
6.  确认并把校准定下来。
7.  校准滑阀和滑块。
8.  校准温度与压力读数。
9.  纠正装置中的任何错误。
10.讲述给操作人员。
